name: Hound Master
description: Optional R.C.C. (GM approval) — elite Hound troop leaders with horns, black capes, speech, minor psionics, and illusion shells to pass as humans. Diabolic or Miscreant only (never Aberrant or good); book discourages player characters except evil or ruthless anarchist renegades. Shadow O.C.C. `occ_hound_master_rcc` (auto-mounted). A.R. 14 vs normal weapons. Typical experience level 2D4+1.

activation.duration: 10 minutes per level (self) or 5 minutes per level (two to five disguised)
activation.save: Illusion Shells — psionic disguise; max five Hounds on undercover missions

metadata.renegadeNotes: May betray overlords for another Nightlord or go renegade; brigands, sorcerer pawns, or Earth street-gang controllers (conflict with Warlords)

demographics.averageLifespan: Unknown — may live centuries; usually killed in combat

classAbilities.name: Illusion & Concealment Immunity
classAbilities.description: Immune to all illusions and powers of concealment — sees through Shroud Talent, invisibility, and magical or psionic disguise/camouflage.

classAbilities.name: Illusion Shells
classAbilities.description: Psionic disguise: 4 I.S.P. to mask self; 8 I.S.P. to disguise up to five others (typically pass as normal humans). Duration 10 minutes per level (self) or 5 minutes per level (two to five people). Maximum five Hounds disguised on undercover missions — see innateBonuses.activation.

classAbilities.name: Supernatural Senses
classAbilities.description: Nightvision 2000 ft (610 m). Expert tracker (animals and humans at 80%). Natural tracking skill 85% on race row. +4 on all Perception rolls; +2 on initiative (apply at table — see metadata).

classAbilities.name: Supernatural Tracking
classAbilities.description: Smell and track supernatural creatures within 80 ft (24.4 m); base 50% + 5% per level.

classAbilities.name: Self-Healing
classAbilities.description: Heals all damage if allowed to stand still for one full hour (regenerative trance).

classAbilities.name: Partial Invulnerability
classAbilities.description: Takes half damage from all non-magical weapons and attacks.

classAbilities.name: Hand to Hand: Assassin
classAbilities.description: Equivalent to Hand to Hand: Assassin with one additional strike/attack per melee round from 1st level (+1 APM in modifiers).

classAbilities.name: Armor Rating
classAbilities.description: A.R. 14 against normal weapons; A.R. 0 against magical and supernatural attacks. Horned exoskeleton and black cape — no worn body armor.

classAbilities.name: Innate Psionics
classAbilities.description: Minor psychic — Mind Block and Empathy at 1st level (shadow O.C.C. ispEngine), plus Illusion Shells above. I.S.P. M.E. + 1D6×10 + 2D6 per level.

classAbilities.name: Magic Vulnerability
classAbilities.description: Takes double damage from magic artifacts, magic weapons, Nightbane Talents, and powers/spells.

classAbilities.name: Languages
classAbilities.description: Speak all languages magically.

classAbilities.name: Darkblade Spears
classAbilities.description: Primary weapon — 3D6 plus P.S. damage; cuts through all known materials. Rarely issued other weapons.

classAbilities.name: Alliances
classAbilities.description: Serve Nightlords and avatars; lead Hounds (`race_hound`, 20+) or undercover teams of 3–5 disguised Hounds. Sometimes commanded by Dopplegangers or Hollow Men; work alongside Hunters (`race_hunter`). Solo missions rare — usually left to Night Princes or Avatars. Renegades may serve other Nightlords, hunt humans, or control street gangs.

classAbilities.name: Experience
classAbilities.description: Typical level 2D4+1 (Hound & Hunter XP table via shadow O.C.C.).

name: Snake Bird
description: Optional R.C.C. (GM approval) — sentient feathered-serpent spellcasters resembling extinct feathered serpents; eagle-like fliers with squawking speech and natural wizard magic. Lone hunters or mated pairs; may befriend magicians or serve Nightlords as torturers. Player characters at GM discretion — uses Mystic experience table via shadow O.C.C. `occ_snake_bird_rcc`. Typical experience level 1D6+1; a few reach 12th level and beyond.

activation.save: Lethal poison — save vs poison each melee or 3D6 direct to H.P. first round and 1D6 per melee (half on success); affects supernatural beings

metadata.spellPoolGmNote: Nightbane, Palladium Fantasy, Rifts, Beyond the Supernatural

demographics.averageHeight: Body 4–5 ft (1.2–1.5 m); wingspan 7–10 ft (2.1–3 m)

classAbilities.name: Flight & Senses
classAbilities.description: Powerful flier (eagle-like maneuvers). Sense supernatural creatures within 100 ft (30.5 m). Exceptional vision 2 miles (3.2 km); nightvision 500 ft (152 m).

classAbilities.name: Regeneration
classAbilities.description: Regenerate 5 S.D.C./H.P. at the end of each melee round.

classAbilities.name: Natural Spell Casting
classAbilities.description: Innate wizard-style magic — six spells (levels 1–3) at 1st level, then two new spells per level (equal or below current level). P.P.E. P.E.×5 + 12 per level on shadow O.C.C. All other magic rules as Mystic O.C.C. (no psychic abilities). G.M. may allow spells from Nightbane, Palladium Fantasy, Rifts, and Beyond the Supernatural.

classAbilities.name: Combat — Natural Abilities
classAbilities.description: Three attacks per melee at 1st level (or two while casting by magic); +1 attack at levels 4 and 8. +1 initiative and +1 on all Perception rolls; +5 strike and +5 dodge in the air (+2 strike/dodge on ground); +6 damage on swooping attacks — apply at table (see metadata).

classAbilities.name: Claw & Poison Bite
classAbilities.description: Claws 2D6 S.D.C. Bite 1D6 plus lethal poison — see innateBonuses.activation. Affects supernatural beings.

classAbilities.name: Languages
classAbilities.description: Speaks Dragonese (mythical tongue of dragons, elves, and faerie) at 98%. Two additional languages of choice at +20% via shadow O.C.C. picks.

classAbilities.name: Hit Points per Level
classAbilities.description: True H.P. = P.E. + 1D4 per level of experience (catalog `PE+1D4` is 1st-level baseline; add 1D4 each level).

classAbilities.name: Habitat & Enemies
classAbilities.description: Any terrain; prefers mountains. Nightlands, Earth, and other dimensions. Enemies: large predators, Nightlords and their minions. May befriend magicians or Nightbane; evil specimens sometimes serve Nightlords torturing humans and Dopplegangers.

classAbilities.name: Experience
classAbilities.description: Typical level 1D6+1 (Mystic / Snakebird XP table via shadow O.C.C.); a few reach near-legendary 12th+ levels.

name: Night Prince
description: Ba'al-Zebul — chief lieutenants of the `race_nightlord` (rank below Avatars). Human-looking illusion masters and energy vampires; infiltrators, cult leaders, and war commanders on Earth since antiquity. Also called Night Princes or Night Squires (low-level, undistinguished). GM approval only — player characters discouraged but possible at G.M. discretion. Shadow O.C.C. `occ_night_prince_rcc` (auto-mounted). S.D.C. 2D4×10+120; H.P. P.E.×2 (+2D6/level). P.P.E. 1D4×100 (+15/level). Typical experience 1D4+4. Horror Factor 9 (illusions up to 18).

activation.save: Save vs magic when victim suspects illusion; Difficult Perception or worse for multi-sense illusions

classAbilities.name: Hit Points & P.P.E. Scaling
classAbilities.description: True H.P. = P.E.×2 + 2D6 per level (catalog `PE*2+12` approximates mid-tier). P.P.E. +15 per level after base 1D4×100 (shadow O.C.C. `ppeEngine`).

classAbilities.name: Supernatural Endurance
classAbilities.description: Heal 1D4×10 S.D.C./H.P. every minute (4 melees). See invisible and all illusions (including other Night Princes'). Impervious to mind control. Nightvision 500 ft (152 m). Sense ley lines/nexus 1 mile (1.6 km). No food, water, or air required.

classAbilities.name: Energy Vampirism
classAbilities.description: 5 H.P./P.P.E. per day minimum to survive; 10–20/day for satisfaction. Miss a meal: −1 P.P.E. (restore with +5 extra on next feeding). At 0 P.P.E., lose 1 P.E./day until dust.

classAbilities.name: Illusionary Powers
classAbilities.description: P.P.E.-fueled constructs — see innateBonuses.activation and metadata for tier costs, range, volume, and Horror Factor caps. Death-by-illusion shock rules apply. May fake spellcasting with illusion effects.

classAbilities.name: Hand to Hand: Assassin
classAbilities.description: Equivalent to Hand to Hand: Assassin with +1 attack per melee from 1st level (+1 APM in modifiers). Supernatural strength damage.

classAbilities.name: Perception Bonus
classAbilities.description: +5 on Perception rolls (apply at table — see metadata).

classAbilities.name: Vulnerabilities
classAbilities.description: Double damage from Nightbane attacks/Talents and Guardian energy powers.

classAbilities.name: Night Squires
classAbilities.description: Low-level, undistinguished Night Princes — same R.C.C., lower experience.

classAbilities.name: Alliances
classAbilities.description: Often command Hound Masters (`race_hound_master`), Hollow Men (`race_hollow_man`), and Ashmedai (`race_ashmedai`); may lead full Nightlord armies. Infiltrate high society, Preserver Party networks, and NSB-adjacent power structures.

classAbilities.name: Experience
classAbilities.description: Typical level 1D4+4 (Night Prince & Vampire XP table via shadow O.C.C.).
